credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the LPID (Legal Person ID) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. Implementations may conceptually treat this as a layered model (base + domain), but the structure is flat for systems that expect a single JSON Schema document, such as current organizational wallet templates.

attributes.name: isccSchemes

attributes.name: recognitionStatus
attributes.description: The current ISCC recognition status of the Certification Body. Required. Example: active

attributes.name: recognitionDate
attributes.description: The date on which the Certification Body was first recognised by ISCC for the relevant schemes. Required. ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2024-05-20

attributes.name: recognitionExpiry
attributes.description: The expiry date of the current ISCC recognition, if applicable. ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2027-05-20

attributes.name: regions
attributes.description: The regions and/or countries in which this Certification Body is allowed to perform ISCC audits. Values can be regional labels (e.g. EU, Europe, Global) or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (e.g. NL, DE). Optional.

attributes.name: scopes
attributes.description: The audit scopes for which this Certification Body is recognised under ISCC (for example, traceability, waste & residues, GHG verification, RFNBO/SAF). Optional.

attributes.name: officialWebsite
attributes.description: The official website of the Certification Body. Optional. Example: https://www.dekra-certification.nl

attributes.name: certificateLookup
attributes.description: A public URL where ISCC certificates or audit information for this CB or its clients can be looked up. Optional. Example: https://certificates.iscc-system.org

attributes.description: One or more alpha-2 country codes as specified in ISO 3166-1, representing the nationality of the user to whom the person identification data relates.

attributes.name: address/country
attributes.description: The country where the user to whom the person identification data relates currently resides, as an alpha-2 country code as specified in ISO 3166-1.

attributes.name: address/locality
attributes.description: for the city or other locality

attributes.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the person identification data user at the time of birth.

attributes.name: birth_given_name
attributes.description: First name(s), including middle name(s), of the person identification data user at the time of birth.

attributes.name: email
attributes.description: Electronic mail address of the user to whom the person identification data relates [in conformance with RFC 5322].

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: Mobile telephone number of the user to whom the person identification data relates, starting with the ‘+’ symbol as the international code prefix and the country code, followed by numbers only.

attributes.name: picture
attributes.description: Facial image of the wallet user compliant with ISO 19794-5 or ISO 39794 specifications.The image SHALL be encoded as binary data.

attributes.name: personal_administrative_number
attributes.description: A value assigned to the natural person that is unique among all personal administrative numbers issued by the provider of person identification data. Where Member States opt to include this attribute, they shall describe in their electronic identification schemes under which the person identification data is issued, the policy that they apply to the values of this attribute, including, where applicable, specific conditions for the processing of this value.

attributes.name: sex
attributes.description: Values shall be one of the following: 0 = not known; 1 = male; 2 = female; 3 = other; 4 = inter; 5 = diverse; 6 = open; 9 = not applicable. For values 0, 1, 2 and 9, ISO/IEC 5218 applies.

attributes.name: age_over_18
attributes.description: Attesting whether the User to whom the person identification data relates is currently an adult (true) or a minor (false). (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

attributes.name: age_in_years
attributes.description: The current age of the User to whom the person identification data relates in years. (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

attributes.name: age_birth_year
attributes.description: The year when the User to whom the person identification data relates was born. (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the PID (Person Identification Data) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is derived from the EWC PID Rulebook (WP3)

This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the VAT (Tax) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is aligned with the IETF SD-JWT VC data model: generic SD-JWT VC claims (iss, sub, vct, iat, nbf, exp, jti, cnf) are defined alongside the domain-specific LPID claims. Implementations may conceptually treat this as a layered model (base + domain), but the structure is flat for systems that expect a single JSON Schema document, such as current organizational wallet templates.

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/operationalScope
attributes.description: The operational scope of the emissions performance. Only scope 1 & 2, or including upstream scope 3 (cradle to gate) or upstream and downstream scope 3 (cradle to grave).

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/primarySourcedRatio
attributes.description: The ratio of emissions data from primary sources (ie from supplier / product specific information rather than secondary / industry averages).

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard
attributes.description: A standard (eg ISO 14000) that specifies the criteria for conformance.

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the standard (eg https://www.iso.org/standard/60857.html).

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/name
attributes.description: The name of the standard

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/issuingParty
attributes.description: The party that issued the standard

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/issuingParty/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the party as a URI, ideally as a resolvable ID.

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/issuingParty/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the party within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/issuingParty/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: emissionsScorecard/reportingStandard/issueDate
attributes.description: The date when the standard was issued.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation
attributes.description: An array of traceability events grouped by value chain process.  Where actual traceability events are unavailable or carry sensitive information, passport publishers may specify the extent to which the traceability information has been independently verified.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/valueChainProcess
attributes.description: Human readable name for the industry specific value chain process representing this traceability data set.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/verifiedRatio
attributes.description: The proportion (0 to 1) of materials in this value chain process that have been  traced using verifiable traceability event.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent
attributes.description: A list of secure links to digital traceability events that support this traceability performance statement. May be encrypted for confidentiality purposes.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/linkURL
attributes.description: The URL of the target resource.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/linkName
attributes.description: A display name for the target resource

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/linkType
attributes.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/hashDigest
attributes.description: The hash of the file.

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/hashMethod
attributes.description: The hashing algorithm used to create the target hash.  SHA-265 is the recommended standard

attributes.name: traceabilityInformation/item/traceabilityEvent/item/encryptionMethod
attributes.description: The symmetric encryption algorithm used to encrypt the link target.  AES is the recommended standard. Decryption keys are expected to be passed out of bounds.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard
attributes.description: High level circularity information about this product.  Note that this does not substitute for detailed product circularity data sheet (PCDS) criteria which would be represented as a self-issued UNTP Digital Conformity Credential as a set of assessments against individual ISO PCDS criteria.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recyclingInformation
attributes.description: A structure to provide a URL link plus metadata associated with the link.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recyclingInformation/linkURL
attributes.description: The URL of the target resource.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recyclingInformation/linkName
attributes.description: A display name for the target resource

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recyclingInformation/linkType
attributes.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/repairInformation
attributes.description: A structure to provide a URL link plus metadata associated with the link.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/repairInformation/linkURL
attributes.description: The URL of the target resource.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/repairInformation/linkName
attributes.description: A display name for the target resource

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/repairInformation/linkType
attributes.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recyclableContent
attributes.description: The fraction of the this product (my mass) that has been designed to be recyclable / re-usable. This will be be the total fraction that can avoid waste / landfill.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/recycledContent
attributes.description: The fraction (by mass) of recycled / repurposed, repaired content in this product.  This will be the total virgin content fraction.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/utilityFactor
attributes.description: An indicator of durability defined as the lifetime (typically measures as usage cycles) for this product divided by the industry average. For example a battery with a 10,000 cycle lifetime where industry average is 5,000 cycles will have a durability factor of 2. If unknown set to 1 or omit.

attributes.name: circularityScorecard/materialCircularityIndicator
attributes.description: The overall circularity performance indicator for this product. Calculated as 1 - (V+W)/2D where - V = Virgin material proportion by mass (will be 1- recycled content) - W = Waste leakage proportion by mass (will be 1 - recyclableContent)  - D = Utility factor (set to 1 if unknown).

attributes.name: dueDiligenceDeclaration
attributes.description: A structure to provide a URL link plus metadata associated with the link.

attributes.name: dueDiligenceDeclaration/linkURL
attributes.description: The URL of the target resource.

attributes.name: dueDiligenceDeclaration/linkName
attributes.description: A display name for the target resource

attributes.name: dueDiligenceDeclaration/linkType
attributes.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

attributes.name: materialsProvenance
attributes.description: An array of Provenance objects providing details on the origin and mass fraction of components or ingredients of the product batch.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/name
attributes.description: Name of this material (eg "Egyptian Cotton")

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/originCountry
attributes.description:
A ISO 3166-1 code representing the country of origin of the component or ingredient.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/CountryId#

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType
attributes.description: A classification scheme and code / name representing a category value for a product, entity, or facility.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType/id
attributes.description: The globally unique URI representing the specific classifier value

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType/code
attributes.description: classification code within the scheme

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType/name
attributes.description: Name of the classification represented by the code

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType/schemeID
attributes.description: Classification scheme ID

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialType/schemeName
attributes.description: The name of the classification scheme

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/massFraction
attributes.description: The mass fraction of the product represented by this material. The sum of all mass fraction values for a given passport should be 1.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/mass
attributes.description: The measure class defines a numeric measured value (eg 10) and a coded unit of measure (eg KG).

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/mass/value
attributes.description: The numeric value of the measure

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/mass/unit
attributes.description:
Unit of measure drawn from the UNECE Rec20 measure code list.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/UnitMeasureCode#

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/recycledMassFraction
attributes.description: Mass fraction of this material that is recycled (eg 50% recycled Lithium)

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/hazardous
attributes.description: Indicates whether this material is hazardous. If true then the materialSafetyInformation property must be present

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/symbol
attributes.description: Based 64 encoded binary used to represent a visual symbol for a given material.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialSafetyInformation
attributes.description: A structure to provide a URL link plus metadata associated with the link.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialSafetyInformation/linkURL
attributes.description: The URL of the target resource.

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialSafetyInformation/linkName
attributes.description: A display name for the target resource

attributes.name: materialsProvenance/item/materialSafetyInformation/linkType
attributes.description: The type of the target resource - drawn from a controlled vocabulary

credentials.schemaDescription: The Product Passport is a comprehensive data structure that encapsulates various details pertaining to a product, including its identification details, who issued it, batch information, provenance information, circularity information and a set of verifiable product conformity & sustainability claims.

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential for lifecycle events in a value chain.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier (URI) assigned to the product passport. May be a UUID

attributes.name: @context
attributes.description: A list of JSON-LD context URIs that define the semantic meaning of properties within the credential.

attributes.name: issuer
attributes.description: The issuer party (person or organisation) of a verifiable credential.

attributes.name: issuer/id
attributes.description: The W3C DID of the issuer - should be a did:web or did:webvh

attributes.name: issuer/name
attributes.description: The name of the issuer person or organisation

attributes.name: issuer/issuerAlsoKnownAs
attributes.description: An optional list of other registered identifiers for this credential issuer

attributes.name: issuer/issuerAlsoKnownAs/item/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the party as a URI, ideally as a resolvable ID.

attributes.name: issuer/issuerAlsoKnownAs/item/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the party within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: issuer/issuerAlsoKnownAs/item/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: validFrom
attributes.description: The date and time from which the credential is valid.

attributes.name: credentialSubject
attributes.description: VC subject is the transaction event structure

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/id
attributes.description: The unique identifier of this event - SHOULD be a UUID

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/processType
attributes.description: A human readable name for industry specific process represented by this event.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/eventTime
attributes.description: The ISO-8601 date time when the event occurred.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/action
attributes.description: Code describing how an event relates to the life-cycle of the entity impacted by the event.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/disposition
attributes.description:
Disposition code describing the state of the item after the event. 

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://ref.gs1.org/cbv/Disp-

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/bizStep
attributes.description:
A business step code drawn from a controlled vocabulary.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://ref.gs1.org/cbv/BizStep-

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/bizLocation
attributes.description: A Business Location is a uniquely identified and discretely recorded geospatial location that is meant to designate the specific place where an object is assumed to be following an event until it is reported to be at a different Business Location by a subsequent event. The bizLocation must be a resolvable URI that links to facility information and geo-location data.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList
attributes.description: An array (one for each sensor) of sensor device data sets associated with the event.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorMetadata
attributes.description: A physical sensor that records a sensor data set.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorMetadata/device
attributes.description: A specific serialised trade item which is an instance of a more generic product.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorMetadata/device/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the product as a URI. Ideally as a resolvable URL according to ISO 18975.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorMetadata/device/name
attributes.description: The name of the product class to which the product item belongs.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorMetadata/dataProcessingMethod
attributes.description: The data processing method used by the sensor - should reference a documented standard criteria as a URI

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorReport
attributes.description: A list of sensor readings from the given sensor relevant to the traceability event context.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorReport/item/time
attributes.description: the timestamp at which the sensor reading was made.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorReport/item/sensorType
attributes.description: the measurement type of the sensor reading, as a URI reference to a measurement method specification.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorReport/item/value
attributes.description: the sensor reading

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorReport/item/uom
attributes.description:
the unit of measure for the sensor reading, drawn from UNECE rec20 code list.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/UnitMeasureCode#

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/sensorElementList/item/sensorIntegrityProof
attributes.description: An optional reference to a verifiable credential signed by the sensor device or device manufacturer that contains the digitally signed raw data associated with this sensor report.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputEPCList
attributes.description: The list of uniquely identified items that are the output of this transformation event - for example a list of individually identified bolts of cloth that are the output of a weaving process.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputEPCList/item/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the product as a URI. Ideally as a resolvable URL according to ISO 18975.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputEPCList/item/name
attributes.description: The name of the product class to which the product item belongs.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputEPCList
attributes.description: The list of uniquely identified items that are the input of this transformation event - for example a list of individually identified bobbins of yarn that are the input of a weaving process.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputEPCList/item/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the product as a URI. Ideally as a resolvable URL according to ISO 18975.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputEPCList/item/name
attributes.description: The name of the product class to which the product item belongs.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputQuantityList
attributes.description: The quantified list of product classes that are the input of this transformation event - used when each item does not have a unique identity.  for example the weight of raw cotton that is the input to a ginning process.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputQuantityList/item/productId
attributes.description: THe identifier of a product class (as opposed to a product instance) such as a GTIN code for a manufactured product.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputQuantityList/item/productName
attributes.description: The registered name of the product within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputQuantityList/item/quantity
attributes.description: The numeric quantity of the product class (eg 100 kg of cotton)

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/inputQuantityList/item/uom
attributes.description:
The unit of measure for the quantity value (eg Kg or meters etc) using the UNECE Rec 20 unit of measure codelist.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/UnitMeasureCode#

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputQuantityList
attributes.description: The quantified list of product classes that are the output of this transformation event - used when each item does not have a unique identity.  for example a count of the bales of cleaned cotton that are the output of a ginning process.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputQuantityList/item/productId
attributes.description: THe identifier of a product class (as opposed to a product instance) such as a GTIN code for a manufactured product.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputQuantityList/item/productName
attributes.description: The registered name of the product within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputQuantityList/item/quantity
attributes.description: The numeric quantity of the product class (eg 100 kg of cotton)

attributes.name: credentialSubject/item/outputQuantityList/item/uom
attributes.description:
The unit of measure for the quantity value (eg Kg or meters etc) using the UNECE Rec 20 unit of measure codelist.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/UnitMeasureCode#

credentials.schemaDescription: An array of Traceability Events as a VC

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential carrying facility data and sustainability performance.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: An id is not required in the data but jargon requires for blue class which won't redefine credentialSubject

attributes.name: facility
attributes.description: The physical site (eg farm or factory) where the product or materials was produced.

attributes.name: facility/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the facility as URI, ideally as a resolvable URL.

attributes.name: facility/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the facility within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: facility/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the facility within the identifier scheme. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: facility/idScheme
attributes.description: An identifier registration scheme for products, facilities, or organisations. Typically operated by a state, national or global authority.

attributes.name: facility/idScheme/id
attributes.description: The globally unique identifier of the registration scheme. The scheme should be registered and discoverable from vocabulary.uncefact.org/identifierSchemes

attributes.name: facility/idScheme/name
attributes.description: The name of the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: facility/description
attributes.description: An optional short description of the facility

attributes.name: facility/countryOfOperation
attributes.description:
The country in which this facility is operating.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/CountryId#

attributes.name: facility/processCategory
attributes.description: The industrial or production processes performed by this facility. Example unstats.un.org/isic/1030.

attributes.name: facility/processCategory/item/id
attributes.description: The globally unique URI representing the specific classifier value

attributes.name: facility/processCategory/item/code
attributes.description: classification code within the scheme

attributes.name: facility/processCategory/item/name
attributes.description: Name of the classification represented by the code

attributes.name: facility/processCategory/item/schemeID
attributes.description: Classification scheme ID

attributes.name: facility/processCategory/item/schemeName
attributes.description: The name of the classification scheme

attributes.name: facility/operatedByParty
attributes.description: The Party entity responsible for operating the facility.An object structure that uniquely identifies the party within a known party identification scheme.

attributes.name: facility/operatedByParty/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the party as a URI, ideally as a resolvable ID.

attributes.name: facility/operatedByParty/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the party within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: facility/operatedByParty/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: facility/facilityAlsoKnownAs
attributes.description: An optional list of other registered identifiers for this facility - eg GLNs or other schemes.

attributes.name: facility/facilityAlsoKnownAs/item/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the facility as URI, ideally as a resolvable URL.

attributes.name: facility/facilityAlsoKnownAs/item/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the facility within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: facility/facilityAlsoKnownAs/item/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the facility within the identifier scheme. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation
attributes.description: Location information including address and geo-location of points, areas, and boundaries

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation/plusCode
attributes.description: An open location code (https://maps.google.com/pluscodes/) representing this geographic location or region. Open location codes can represent any sized area from a point to a large region and are easily resolved to a visual map location.

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation/geoLocation
attributes.description: Represents a Point geometry

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation/geoLocation/coordinates
attributes.description: Point in 3d space

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation/geoBoundary
attributes.description: Represents a Polygon geometry

attributes.name: facility/locationInformation/geoBoundary/coordinates
attributes.description: Array of PolygonCoordinates

attributes.name: facility/address
attributes.description: A postal address.

attributes.name: facility/address/streetAddress
attributes.description: the street address as an unstructured string.

attributes.name: facility/address/postalCode
attributes.description: The postal code or zip code for this address.

attributes.name: facility/address/addressLocality
attributes.description: The city, suburb or township name.

attributes.name: facility/address/addressRegion
attributes.description: The state or territory or province

attributes.name: facility/address/addressCountry
attributes.description:
The address country as an ISO-3166 two letter country code.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/CountryId#

attributes.name: conformityClaim
attributes.description: A list of conformity declarations against specific criteria from recognised standards or regulations.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the declaration. Often this will be an extension of the product.id or attestation.id. But could be a UUID.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/description
attributes.description: A textual description of the declaration being made.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard
attributes.description: A standard (eg ISO 14000) that specifies the criteria for conformance.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the standard (eg https://www.iso.org/standard/60857.html).

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/name
attributes.description: The name of the standard

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/issuingParty
attributes.description: The party that issued the standard

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/issuingParty/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the party as a URI, ideally as a resolvable ID.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/issuingParty/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the party within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/issuingParty/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceStandard/issueDate
attributes.description: The date when the standard was issued.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation
attributes.description: A regulation (eg EU deforestation regulation) that defines the criteria for assessment.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/id
attributes.description: The globally unique identifier of this regulation.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/name
attributes.description: The name of the regulation or act.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/jurisdictionCountry
attributes.description:
The legal jurisdiction (country) under which the regulation is issued.

    This is an enumerated value, but the list of valid values are too big, or change too often to include here. You can access the list of allowable values at this URL:  https://vocabulary.uncefact.org/CountryId#

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/administeredBy
attributes.description: the issuing body of the regulation. For example Australian Government Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/administeredBy/id
attributes.description: The globally unique ID of the party as a URI, ideally as a resolvable ID.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/administeredBy/name
attributes.description: The registered name of the party within the identifier scheme.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/administeredBy/registeredId
attributes.description: The registration number (alphanumeric) of the Party within the register. Unique within the register.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/referenceRegulation/effectiveDate
attributes.description: the date at which the regulation came into effect.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria
attributes.description: The specification against which the assessment is made.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the criterion within the scheme, standard  or regulation. For example CO2 emissions calculations for liquid fuel combustion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/name
attributes.description: A name that describes this criteria.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/description
attributes.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/conformityTopic
attributes.description: A gloabl UN/CEFACT standard sustainability toipic code.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/status
attributes.description: The lifecycle status of this criterion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion
attributes.description: List of criterion that are subordinate to this criterion in the hierarchy.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the criterion within the scheme, standard  or regulation. For example CO2 emissions calculations for liquid fuel combustion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/name
attributes.description: A name that describes this criteria.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/description
attributes.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/conformityTopic
attributes.description: A gloabl UN/CEFACT standard sustainability toipic code.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/status
attributes.description: The lifecycle status of this criterion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion
attributes.description: List of criterion that are subordinate to this criterion in the hierarchy.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the criterion within the scheme, standard  or regulation. For example CO2 emissions calculations for liquid fuel combustion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/name
attributes.description: A name that describes this criteria.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/description
attributes.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/conformityTopic
attributes.description: A gloabl UN/CEFACT standard sustainability toipic code.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/status
attributes.description: The lifecycle status of this criterion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion
attributes.description: List of criterion that are subordinate to this criterion in the hierarchy.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the criterion within the scheme, standard  or regulation. For example CO2 emissions calculations for liquid fuel combustion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/name
attributes.description: A name that describes this criteria.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/description
attributes.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/conformityTopic
attributes.description: A gloabl UN/CEFACT standard sustainability toipic code.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/status
attributes.description: The lifecycle status of this criterion.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion
attributes.description: List of criterion that are subordinate to this criterion in the hierarchy.

attributes.name: conformityClaim/item/assessmentCriteria/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/subCriterion/item/thresholdValue
attributes.description: A specific measure of performance against the criteria that governs the claim.  Expressed as an array of metric (ie unit of measure) / value (ie the actual numeric value) pairs.
